prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约4291名（2021）、4542名（2023）、4794名（2024）、4441名（2025），整体在4200–4800名区间波动，近3年呈小幅后移趋势；2025年基准位次约4441名；该校在陕西省理科（物理类）招生计划从2021年22人、2023年29人、2024年29人、2025年30人，到2026年大幅扩招至57人，较2025年增加27人（增幅90%），扩招幅度极为显著，将直接拉低录取门槛，使最低位次明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第32位，近年排名稳定在25–32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因校园偷拍事件引发35条负面舆情，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制效应；抖音综合热度排名第87位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；2021–2025年均无投档线断档记录，录取稳定性较好；拥有轻工技术与工程A+、化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A、环境科学与工程A、食品科学与工程A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管理科学与工程A-等9个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续偏热至高热，与该校优势学科高度匹配；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增长约19.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争，但该校大幅扩招有效对冲了竞争压力；华南理工大学位于广东省广州市，属华南地区顶尖工科院校，对陕西省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在陕招生计划近年持续增加，2026年扩招幅度尤为突出，体现对陕西生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4441名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招90%、声誉负面舆情抑制部分报考热度、陕西省物理类考生增长约19.7%等因素；预测2026年理科最低录取位次约6869名，区间6369–7369名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 4291 (2021), 4542 (2023), 4794 (2024), and 4441 (2025), fluctuating within the 4200–4800 range, with a slight backward trend in recent three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4441. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi Province increased from 22 in 2021, 29 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 30 in 2025, to a significant expansion to 57 in 2026, an increase of 27 students (90% growth) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will directly lower the admission threshold, causing a notable backward shift in the minimum ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranks 32nd in the 2026 main list of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with a stable ranking in the 25–32 range in recent years, making it a top-tier engineering university in China, consistently attractive to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly due to 35 negative public opinions triggered by a campus peeping incident, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (evaluation: 'average'), indicating moderately low exposure on short video platforms. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cutoff line gaps, showing good admission stability. It has 9 disciplines rated A- or above, including Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+), Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Materials Science and Engineering (A), Environmental Science and Engineering (A), Food Science and Engineering (A), Architecture (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Management Science and Engineering (A-), highlighting strong engineering capabilities that strongly support applications in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain consistently hot to very hot in society, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025. The expanded candidate pool intensifies overall competition, but the university's significant enrollment expansion effectively offsets the competitive pressure. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a top engineering university in South China, with certain cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi candidates. Its enrollment plan in Shaanxi has been increasing in recent years, with the 2026 expansion being particularly prominent, reflecting its emphasis on Shaanxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4441, the 90% expansion in 2026 enrollment plan, negative reputation suppressing some application enthusiasm, and the approximately 19.7% increase in Shaanxi physics category candidates, the predicted minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 is about 6869, with a range of 6369–7369.

Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (6369) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Outstanding Talent Class, Academician Special Class); candidates with rankings in the middle range (approximately 6500–7000) should target Tier 2 majors (Computer Class, Automation, Electrical Class) as the main direction, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit (7369) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net while striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2084 (2021), 1011 (2022), 904 (2023), 1207 (2024), and 1084 (2025), showing an overall trend of moving forward and then stabilizing, with the 2022–2025 period stable in the 900–1200 range; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1084; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shaanxi Province was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and it will expand to 13 students in 2026, an increase of 3 students (30% increase) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that will moderately push the minimum ranking downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 32nd in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, which also has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to the campus peeping incident causing public opinion, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (evaluation 'average'), with moderately low exposure; there is no historical record of cutoff line breaks; although it is known for engineering, its management science and engineering (A-), business administration, and other economics and management disciplines are relatively strong, supporting liberal arts candidates applying for economics, business administration, and other majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot and recommended, economics is differentiated and wait-and-see but overall hot, business administration is differentiated and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi Province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates; its liberal arts enrollment plan in Shaanxi has been stable at 10 students for a long time, and the first expansion to 13 students in 2026 sends a positive signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1084, the 30% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the suppression of some popularity due to negative reputation incidents, and the approximately 17% increase in history category candidates in Shaanxi Province; it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be approximately 1294, with a range of 1100–1488.
